title: 30 Tex. Admin. Code § 101.4 - Nuisance
text:
No person shall discharge from any source whatsoever one or
more air contaminants or combinations thereof, in such concentration and of
such duration as are or may tend to be injurious to or to adversely affect
human health or welfare, animal life, vegetation, or property, or as to
interfere with the normal use and enjoyment of animal life, vegetation, or
property.
